README.__EMPTY: Clean relational workbook generated from the 30 disclaimer rows in datafiller-1.csv.
Upload this workbook on the Publish page with Upload Workbook.
Personas are created directly from the disclaimer source rows, not generated from family/pricing combinations.
DisplayAsFree=TRUE means render as FREE and strike through StrikeThroughPrice.
Speed options display as SO_1, SO_2, etc.
Search for ReferenceID values like Core-SO_3.

01_Settings.Description: Built from datafiller-1.csv; personas sourced directly from disclaimer rows
Speed option display uses SO_1, SO_2, etc.

04_Modifiers.Description: Applied when a 1 Gig speed option has first paid price $40
Applied to personas in the 3 Months Free pricing set
Applied to personas in the 3 Year Price Lock pricing set

08_Disclaimers.Title: Core-Standard
08_Disclaimers.DisclaimerText: *Promotional rates include AutoPay with checking/savings account or debit card plus paperless billing discount. 300 Mbps download x 20 Mbps upload Internet service: Promotional rate is $39.95/mo. for Months 1-12; $55/mo. for Months 13-24; regular rate is $80/mo. 600 Mbps download x 30 Mbps upload Internet service: promotional rate is $64.95/mo. for 12 months; regular rate is $95/mo. 1000 Mbps download x 50 Mbps upload Internet service: Promotional rate is $40/mo. for Months 1-12; $55/mo. for Months 13-24, $75/mo. for Months 25-36; regular rate is $105/mo. 2000 Mbps download x 2000 Mbps upload Internet service: promotional rate is $94.95/mo. for 12 months; regular rate is $120/mo. Regular rates are subject to change at anytime. Offer expires 9/30/26. Includes Unlimited data plan. Equipment, taxes, surcharges and fees are not included. Customers are required to lease or purchase an approved modem capable of DOCSIS 3.1 in order to receive the internet services listed. Modem with eero lease fee is $14.99/mo. Visit www.sparklight.com/legal/internet-aup for details of Sparklight’s Acceptable Use Policy. Sparklight Mobile requires Sparklight Internet. Offer is for one Sparklight Mobile line at no additional cost for 12 months; taxes and fees not included. Up to 6 mobile lines per customer. Includes unlimited talk and text messages. The Sparklight Mobile Unlimited plan may require network management after 30 GB to ensure overall service levels for all customers. Actual internet speeds may vary based on factors such as time of day, network congestion, and customer equipment. for more information, visit mobile.sparklight.com/network-management. Terms of use available at mobile.sparklight.com/terms. All offers and services not available in all areas. Offer available to new customers only. New customers are those who have not had service with Sparklight in the past 90 days. Cannot be combined with other promotional offers. Restrictions apply. Call for details. eero and all related marks are trademarks of Amazon.com, Inc., eero LLC or its affiliates. ©2026 Cable One, Inc.

12_DataHealth.Check: Personas with PromoIcon missing from Icons table

99_Glossary.Definition: Finished offer/flyer representation, one row in 05_Personas
Base rate card family or variant from the disclaimer source, e.g., CoreMax+(Upto1Gig)
Campaign group such as Standard, 3 Months Free, or 3 Year Price Lock
Displayed as SO_1, SO_2, etc.; identifies the speed option within a persona
Reusable offer overlay such as 1 Gig for $40 or 3 Months Free
Persona-level feature such as Equip Inc or Sym Speed
Normalized pricing periods for each Reference ID
TRUE means render price as FREE and strike through StrikeThroughPrice
